user.title: MÁV Departure Table
user.description:
Enter the MÁV station codes for the route you want to track.

To find a station code: open https://jegy.mav.hu, perform a search between your stations, and inspect the network request to `GetOfferRequest` — the `startStationCode` and `endStationCode` fields contain the 9-digit codes you need.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the MÁV API. Please check the station codes and your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Please check the Home Assistant logs.
